inputs.label: AI Model Type
inputs.businessContext: Select the AI model used for inference. Different models have different token pricing tiers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select the AI model used for inference. Different models have different token pricing tiers.

inputs.label: Input Tokens per Month
inputs.businessContext: Total number of tokens sent to the model as input (prompt) over a month.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of tokens sent to the model as input (prompt) over a month.

inputs.label: Output Tokens per Month
inputs.businessContext: Total number of tokens generated by the model as output (completion) over a month.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of tokens generated by the model as output (completion) over a month.

inputs.label: Average Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of requests processed together in a single batch to optimize throughput.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of requests processed together in a single batch to optimize throughput.

inputs.label: Compute Hours per Month
inputs.businessContext: Total hours of GPU/TPU compute time allocated for inference per month.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total hours of GPU/TPU compute time allocated for inference per month.

inputs.label: GPU Hourly Cost
inputs.businessContext: Hourly cost of the GPU instance used for inference (e.g., A100, H100).

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly cost of the GPU instance used for inference (e.g., A100, H100).

inputs.label: Overhead Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage overhead for data transfer, API latency, and retries (Lean waste reduction).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage overhead for data transfer, API latency, and retries (Lean waste reduction).

inputs.label: Enable Data Confidence Adjustment
inputs.businessContext: If enabled, applies a confidence factor based on input data quality (Six Sigma DMAIC).

businessContext_i18n.en: If enabled, applies a confidence factor based on input data quality (Six Sigma DMAIC).

rules.message: Batch size cannot exceed total token counts.
Overhead factor must be between 0% and 100%.

thresholds.alert: Monthly cost exceeds $10,000. Consider model optimization or batching.
Low token throughput per compute hour. Review batch size or model efficiency.

formulas.description: Cost of input tokens based on model pricing
Cost of output tokens based on model pricing
Overhead cost as percentage of sum of token and compute costs
Total cost before data confidence adjustment
Data confidence factor based on Six Sigma process capability (default 0.95 if enabled, else 1.0)
Primary result: total monthly cost adjusted for data confidence

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Idle GPU Time
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Unused compute hours due to low batch utilization (Lean waste).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Token Waste from Retries
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Tokens consumed by failed requests and retries (Six Sigma defects).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Model Overprovisioning
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Using a larger model than needed for the task (WERC capacity waste).

suggestedActions.description: Increase batch size to reduce per-request overhead and improve GPU utilization.
Use a distilled or smaller model variant to lower token costs without significant accuracy loss.
Leverage spot/preemptible GPU instances to reduce compute cost by up to 60%.
Implement prompt caching to avoid re-processing identical input tokens.
